meta.title: Boxa Gran Price — Boxing Club in Barcelona · History Repeats Itself
meta.description: Barcelona's temple of boxing opens its doors again. Directed classes, open training and personal coaching in the heart of the Eixample. Book your trial class.

hero.subtitle: Barcelona's temple of boxing opens its doors again.

historia.title: The Gran Price, 1934–1973
paragraphs: On the corner of Casanova and Floridablanca stood, between 1935 and 1973, the Gran Price: a theatre with room for more than 4,500 people that became Barcelona's "temple of boxing".
Designed by architect Marino Canosa on the site of the vanished La Bohemia Modernista hall, its ring saw legends such as Luís Romero, Fred Galiana and Mimoun Ben Ali.
The last fight night was held on 29 September 1972. The building was sold and demolished in 1973. Half a century later, that seed is growing again in the heart of the Eixample.

timeline.text: Luís Romero fights at the Price.
The building is sold and demolished.
The Gran Price is reborn as a boxing club.

club.title: Real boxing, in the heart of Barcelona
paragraphs: Boxing is an interval-based cardio training system: 3 minutes of work, 1 minute of rest. It sharpens reflexes and defensive instinct, and it's a remarkable ally for mental health.
Our one-hour classes include pad work, technique, heavy bag, jump rope, shadow boxing and circuits, with a contact level each student chooses for themselves.
The club occupies a listed, historic space in the Eixample, with 5-metre ceilings and exposed stone walls — the perfect stage for history to repeat itself.

items.title: Directed Classes
items.description: Group classes led by our coaches: technique, power and pad work in every session.

items.title: Open Training
items.description: Free, self-directed training with full access to the gym, bags and equipment, at your own pace.

items.title: Personal Coaching
items.description: One-to-one sessions with a coach, with a training plan built around you.

miguel-estrella.bio: Over 35 years of experience in boxing, both as a competitor and as a coach. Founder of Boxa Sant Adrià, Boxa Sant Gervasi and Boxa Gran Price.

lefoumusicon.bio: Catalan Amateur Champion 2000, 2001, 2002 and 2003. Gold medal at the Spanish Amateur Championship 2001/02. Catalan Professional Champion and E.B.U. Official Eliminator Champion 2009.

tarifas.title: Step into the ring
tarifas.discountNote: Discounts available on 2, 3, 6 and 12-month packages. Check conditions in the Members area.
